title: Komm susser Tod DUBSTEP REMIX Evangelion
display_title: Komm susser Tod DUBSTEP REMIX Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Komm, susser Tod: DUBSTEP REMIX (Evangelion) Post by Tabby-chan » Fri Mar 30, 2012 5:02 pm Okay, opinions. Mine? What the...this is brilliant, but I certainly can't see this in a movie. I don't recall it being made for that, but still. Oh, and for those of you who didn't catch the news flash on the News Wall, here's the link to the dubstep remix: http://smashmybox.co.uk/?tw_p=twt Check out the tracks. So yea. Post your opinions here. That is, if somebody else didn't get to the subject before I did...orz

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Mar 30, 2012 6:12 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/post/532346/Komm-Susser-Tod-Who-is-Arianne/#532346 There's already a thread on it in the other subforum. The new Komm Susser Todd tracks have nothing to do with Rebuild or Khara, they're just Arianne's doing.
